baseline.build: fresh isolated cargo build --release --locked --bin cligen during evaluation; receipt binds source commit/tree, Cargo.lock, Cargo/rustc versions, command/profile, and executed binary SHA-256

burn_and_prefix_rule.nested_horizons: one 100-year stream per site/configuration/burn; the 30-year result is its exact prefix
burn_and_prefix_rule.stage_reuse: a deterministic stream identity may be reused at later fidelity; no new burn replaces a failed or unfavorable burn

candidate_fit_rule: refit all eight frozen configurations from the coefficient_fit roles; no A9c fit artifact is reused as an A9c3 fit

candidate_fit_side_amendment.daily_fit_eligibility: retain the exact class-specific A9c requirements: at least 15 years, at least 300 wet and 300 dry days, renewal at least 50 wet and 50 dry spells, latent at least 100 assigned days per state
candidate_fit_side_amendment.event_fit_identifiability: retain A9c global borrowing eligibility of at least 1000 fit events from at least five sites and at least 100 fit events per stratum
candidate_fit_side_amendment.evaluation_floor_removed: the A9c 150/200 development-event availability floors do not apply
candidate_fit_side_amendment.hierarchy: station within frozen stratum within global, unchanged from A9c
candidate_fit_side_amendment.pooling_and_shrinkage: retain registered pooling strengths 50 or 150 from each configuration and the event-law stratum-to-global shrinkage scale of 150; these are fit regularization scales, not observed-development availability floors

daily_development.source: Daymet V4 R1 normalized A9c development objects
daily_development.observed_generated_calendar_comparison: no date pairing or leap-day imputation; compute registered month/season/year distributional summaries on each source's own valid civil calendar, then compare summaries

fresh_rng_identity.baseline: faithful CLIGEN burn identities listed in this freeze; no A9 random field
fresh_rng_identity.candidate: A9 Philox4x32-10 random-field contract with the exact simulation campaign a9c/a9c3-{configuration_id}; component/date/slot ownership unchanged
fresh_rng_identity.fit_optimizer_parameter_member: fit, optimizer, and hierarchical parameter-member selection are deterministic and have no RNG stream; each records a separate SHA-256 identity over an a9c3 domain, configuration/source inputs, or fitted-detail content as applicable

grouped_storm_amendment.component_aggregation: root-mean-square standardized component difference within objective; each stratum row takes the maximum of its four objective distances; the familywise threshold calibration takes the maximum over all objective/stratum rows
grouped_storm_amendment.construct_change: The sparse hot-arid successor replaces the original site-season distribution distances with complete-record transformed summaries. This amended construct is exploratory, avoids empty seasonal cells and arbitrary count floors, and cannot be described as confirming the original A9a storm hypotheses.
grouped_storm_amendment.distance: For each objective, subtract the equal-weight observed group vector from the equal-weight generated group vector, divide componentwise by the candidate-blind station-year bootstrap scale with a 0.02 lower bound, and take root mean square. Boundary equality is non-degradation when candidate minus faithful equals the frozen threshold.

estimands.storm_duration: equal-station mean of station log-duration median, q10, and q90
estimands.storm_joint_dependence: equal-station mean of finite pairwise rank correlations over log depth, log duration, logit time-to-peak, log peak ratio, seasonal phase, and log antecedent dry time
estimands.storm_peak_ratio: equal-station mean of station log peak-ratio median, q10, and q90
estimands.storm_time_to_peak: equal-station mean of station logit time-to-peak median, q10, and q90

grouped_storm_amendment.generated_weighting: equal weight for every frozen generated contributor within stratum, identical for faithful CLIGEN and both candidates
grouped_storm_amendment.missing_and_nonfinite_rule: no imputation and no favorable zero; any nonfinite group component or a stratum with no events returns HOLD-A9C3-GROUP-ESTIMATOR
grouped_storm_amendment.observed_weighting_all_strata: equal weight for the two frozen USCRN development stations in each stratum; within a station every observed event is retained at its actual frequency
grouped_storm_amendment.season_rule: complete-record marginal summaries replace seasonal cells; seasonal phase and antecedent dry time remain explicit dimensions of the amended joint-dependence vector
grouped_storm_amendment.site_season_disclosure: publish event counts and transformed marginal summaries for every observed site and DJF/MAM/JJA/SON cell, plus the pooled result and either-site-removal sensitivity; these are diagnostics, not support floors

hypotheses.rule: both actual classes produce at least one valid fresh fit and remain structurally non-isomorphic
all four equal-weight two-site hot-arid storm estimators are finite; precision and power are reported but do not impose a roster floor
the frozen selector identifies at most one class after rejecting hard failures, incomplete mandatory evidence, and material degradation
zero locked confirmation station-year series are accessed

historical_threshold_non_reuse: A9c null-threshold values are not relabeled as A9c3 values; A9c3 reruns all seven family-by-horizon numeric gates under a9c3 domains before fitting

all_family_threshold_calibration.non_storm_method: A9c paired same-observed-law year-block maximum statistic, rerun with SHA-256 domain a9c3-null-v1

precision_power_diagnostic.minimum_detectable_shift: two-sided alpha 0.05, target power 0.80, normal approximation on each scalar transformed estimand
precision_power_diagnostic.multiplicity: report every component; no component-specific pass is inferred
precision_power_diagnostic.resampling_unit: complete Local Standard Time station-years within station, independently by station, retaining all events in a selected year and equal station weights
precision_power_diagnostic.rng: NumPy Philox; SHA-256 domain a9c3-grouped-bootstrap-v1 plus replicate and station identity

grouped_storm_threshold_calibration.method: 500 paired independent station-year block-bootstrap group estimates per horizon; root-mean-square standardized distance within objective, maximum across all four objectives and six strata; 95th-percentile higher order statistic
grouped_storm_threshold_calibration.scale: bootstrap standard deviation of the first group estimate by stratum/objective/component, lower-bounded at 0.02

monthly_reconciliation.fit_path_method: two independent draws of at least 200000 full fitted-process month paths per retained fit, each balanced over every fitted station and calendar month under distinct target and heldout members of the a9c3-monthly-reconciliation-v1 Philox domain; compare target all-lag daily variance/covariance moments evaluated by monthly_moments with heldout direct 28/29/30/31-day total moments
monthly_reconciliation.uncertainty_tolerance: the larger of absolute tolerance, relative tolerance, and 3.290527 times the combined target/heldout Monte Carlo standard error, separately for mean and variance
monthly_reconciliation.source: inherited unchanged from the A9c campaign freeze

stage_promotion.full_development: within each class order short-screen records by complete first, then ascending median normalized family distance, then ascending configuration_id; retain first two
stage_promotion.hard_failure: a hard failure never advances and remains in the attempt inventory
stage_promotion.pareto_replay: within each class order full-development records by complete first, then ascending material-degradation count, then ascending median normalized family distance, then ascending configuration_id; retain first one
stage_promotion.short_screen_evidence: all 20 frozen generated contributors, both first burns, 30-year prefix, all seven family summaries
stage_promotion.unavailable: mandatory unavailable evidence sorts after every complete record and cannot be treated as zero distance

materially_improved_family_count: count a family once only when it materially improves in at least one mandatory stratum at both 30 and 100 years and has no material degradation row

storm_development.source: NOAA USCRN Subhourly01 normalized A9c development objects

two_site_generalization_limit: Hot-arid storm evidence is limited to Yuma and Stovepipe Wells; no physical or spatial universality claim is permitted.
